description: 193 - 24-04-2025 - Email to Peter Mandelson from Ed Llewellyn (former HM Ambassador to Italy, FCDO’
text:
From: Ed Llewellyn Personal

Sent: Thur 24/04/2025 7:24:38 AM (UTC)

To: Jonathan Powell Personal ]; Ailsa Terry
(No.10) Personal ; Oliver Robbins Personal 3
Michael Ellam Personal ; Peter
Mandelson Personal : Caroline
Hurndall Personal a JCS Personal 7
Lindsay Appleby Personal

Subject: Personal: Meeting with Third Party = ost

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY

Jonathan, Ailsa, all.

I caught up with Third Party vesterday evening, i

554

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Ed
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE - RECIPIENTS ONLY
***
555
